articles.title: Dow futures down more than 500 points as Brent crude again tops $100 a barrel
articles.summary: Stock futures tumbled after hours on Wednesday, building on earlier losses for the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average, as crude-oil prices pressed higher.

articles.title: Why the IEA’s largest-ever release of oil reserves is pushing up crude prices
articles.summary: The largest-ever release of oil from the International Energy Agency’s emergency stockpiles lifted prices for the commodity up by nearly 5% on Wednesday.

articles.title: Salesforce makes a big splash in the debt market so it can quickly buy back 14% of its stock
articles.summary: The software giant will conduct $25 billion worth of accelerated share repurchases after management previously signaled that the stock is too cheap.

articles.title: The next 7 days in Iran will determine if we face stagflation or a total global recession
articles.summary: Your portfolio probably isn’t ready for the Iran conflict’s escalation.

articles.title: Petco is leaning on services, fresh food and pet tarantulas — and it is paying off
articles.summary: Shares of Petco Health & Wellness jumped after hours on Wednesday after the pet-supplies retailer said it expects sales to rebound this year, as efforts to overhaul its store selections and lean more into services like dog grooming and training are starting to pay off.

articles.title: Inside the booming business of wellness third spaces and membership clubs
articles.summary: A growing number of consumers are seeking out third spaces and membership clubs surrounding wellness, to improve their health while also socializing.

articles.title: FDA vaccine head will step down in April after string of controversial decisions

articles.title: Ticketmaster parent Live Nation reaches settlement with Department of Justice over antitrust concerns

articles.title: Home sellers are relisting properties at fastest pace in a decade, but spring supply is still low
articles.summary: Frustrated sellers who pulled homes off the market last fall are now relisting them at a quick pace, thanks to lower mortgage rates, but supply is still low.

articles.title: FDA reversals leave investors worrying about the fates of other experimental drugs
articles.summary: Investors are scrutinizing the prospects for some drugs in the pipeline following a string of recent rejections from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration.

articles.title: Toyota, Hyundai and Chinese automakers expected to be most impacted by Iran war

articles.title: Used vehicle prices jump ahead of spring selling season optimism

articles.title: United CEO Scott Kirby says higher airfare could be ahead after fuel price spike
articles.summary: United CEO Scott Kirby said demand remains high but that fuel prices will hit first-quarter results.

articles.title: Historic winter storms weigh on Gap, Old Navy performance after 800 temporary store closures
